summary_one_line: Input must carry a valid hIST chunk so PNG_FREE_HIST is set in both mask and free_me, enabling the bitmask gate.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A structurally valid hIST chunk (correct 4-byte chunk type plus dependency chunks like PLTE) so png reading allocates info_ptr->hist and sets the PNG_FREE_HIST bit in info_ptr->free_me; this makes ((mask & PNG_FREE_HIST) & info_ptr->free_me) non-zero at png.c:640.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving seeds are large (1013-1133 bytes) value_profile_cmplog inputs that drive deep into png_free_data, taking the hIST true branch (lines 641-645 marked [W]) and reaching PLTE/eXIf free paths the loser never hits; the branch row shows W T=6 F=23 versus L T=0 F=23 at line 640.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking value_profile seeds, though they share the same PNG/IHDR/gAMA/sRGB header bytes, never construct the chunk state that sets PNG_FREE_HIST; they spend their executions in earlier free paths (sCAL/pCAL lines 519-547 marked [L]) and at line 640 record T=0 F=23 — the true side is never taken across all 10 trials.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace, which value_profile lacks. I2SRandReplace substitutes logged comparison operands (the 4-byte hIST chunk-type literal and the bit constants compared while libpng dispatches chunk handlers) directly into the matching input bytes, letting the winner manufacture a valid hIST chunk that flips PNG_FREE_HIST. value_profile only nudges Hamming-distance feedback buckets and cannot place the exact chunk-type bytes, so it stalls.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocking branch is a bitmask AND gate over PNG_FREE_HIST and info_ptr->free_me whose true side is globally blocked.
The winner takes the hIST true branch and frees info_ptr->hist while the loser never does.
At the blocker line the winner takes the true side 6 times while the loser takes it zero times.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 640  T=6 F=23  T=0 F=23  if (((mask & PNG_FREE_HIST) & info_ptr->free_me) != 0)  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: Winner-resolving seeds are large value_profile_cmplog inputs (1013-1133 bytes).
Loser-blocking seeds come from value_profile and never resolve the branch across all 10 trials.
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace whereas value_profile has no I2S mutator.
value_profile relies only on CMP_MAP distance buckets with no I2S substitution.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 3816 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed f5d9e6546b2de5f3` and observed 1 I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 6 of the 7-level ancestor chain; the tool reports this as the lower-bound I2S signal exclusive to cmplog/vpc.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on a hIST-style 4-byte chunk-type literal where value_profile resolves the gate as often as value_profile_cmplog, showing CMP_MAP gradient alone suffices and I2S substitution is not the decisive technique.

weakest_evidence_point: I infer the exact chunk-type/bit literal that I2S substitutes from source structure rather than from a concentrated byte-diff offset directly aligning to the hIST chunk type, since the BYTE DIFF only shows header-region offsets.
